page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tool identifies differentially expressed genes in RNA-seq data under all possible study designs such as studies without replicates, without sample groups, and with unknown conditions, but also for known conditions, for example for RNA-Seq data with two or multiple conditions. It works as an statistical model that is selected in a Bayesian framework by an EM algorithm.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This tool identifies differentially expressed genes in RNA-seq data under all possible study designs such as studies without replicates, without sample groups, and with unknown conditions, but also for known conditions, for example for RNA-Seq data with two or multiple conditions. It works as an statistical model that is selected in a Bayesian framework by an EM algorithm.
